# Orbs Network

> Orbs is a decentralized Layer-3 (L3) blockchain designed for advanced on-chain trading.
> Provides AI agent skills for gasless, non-custodial DeFi order execution.

## AI Skills

- [Advanced Swap Orders](https://orbs-network.github.io/spot/skills/advanced-swap-orders/SKILL.md): Gasless limit, stop-loss, take-profit, and TWAP orders across EVM chains. MCP-compatible, works with any AI coding agent like Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf.

## Skill Discovery

- Skill spec: https://orbs-network.github.io/spot/skills/advanced-swap-orders/SKILL.md
- AI plugin manifest: https://www.orbs.com/assets/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Skill page: https://www.orbs.com/ai/skills/advanced-swap-orders/

## Links

- Website: https://www.orbs.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/orbs-network/spot
- Telegram: https://t.me/OrbsNetwork
- X: https://x.com/orbs_network
